approved_command_preview: $repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine'); call Google AI Studio Gemini generateContent using DCOIR_GEMINI_API; write committed success or failure details beside the exec workflow report.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$requestId = 'exec-20260528-google-ai-studio-gemini-smoke-003'
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$reportDir = Join-Path $repo ('chatgpt_staging/status_reports/chatgpt-exec/' + $requestId)
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $reportDir | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $downloads | Out-Null
$summaryJsonPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'gemini_api_smoke_summary.json'
$summaryMdPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'gemini_api_smoke_summary.md'
$apiKey = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_GEMINI_API','Machine')
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($apiKey)) { throw 'DCOIR_GEMINI_API is not available in the runner environment.' }
$uri = 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-flash-latest:generateContent'
$headers = @{ 'X-goog-api-key' = $apiKey; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' }
$bodyObject = [ordered]@{ contents = @(@{ parts = @(@{ text = 'Explain how AI works in a few words.' }) }) }
$bodyJson = $bodyObject | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8
try {
  $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $uri -Headers $headers -Body $bodyJson
  $choiceText = ''
  if ($null -ne $response.candidates -and $response.candidates.Count -gt 0 -and $null -ne $response.candidates[0].content -and $null -ne $response.candidates[0].content.parts -and $response.candidates[0].content.parts.Count -gt 0) {
    $choiceText = [string]$response.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text
  }
  $summary = [ordered]@{
    request_id = $requestId
    result = 'success'
    endpoint = $uri
    model_requested = 'gemini-flash-latest'
    first_candidate_text = $choiceText
    created_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')
  }
  $summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Out-File -FilePath $summaryJsonPath -Encoding utf8
  $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 16 | Out-File -FilePath (Join-Path $downloads 'gemini_api_smoke_response.json') -Encoding utf8
  @('# Google AI Studio Gemini smoke test','',('- endpoint: ' + $uri),('- model_requested: gemini-flash-latest'),('- first_candidate_text: ' + $choiceText),('- created_utc: ' + (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))) | Out-File -FilePath $summaryMdPath -Encoding utf8
}
catch {
  $exceptionMessage = $_.Exception.Message
  $statusCode = ''
  try { if ($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode) { $statusCode = [string][int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } } catch {}
  $errorDetails = ''
  try { if ($_.ErrorDetails -and $_.ErrorDetails.Message) { $errorDetails = [string]$_.ErrorDetails.Message } } catch {}
  $summary = [ordered]@{
    request_id = $requestId
    result = 'failure'
    endpoint = $uri
    model_requested = 'gemini-flash-latest'
    status_code = $statusCode
    exception_message = $exceptionMessage
    error_details = $errorDetails
    created_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')
  }
  $summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Out-File -FilePath $summaryJsonPath -Encoding utf8
  @('# Google AI Studio Gemini smoke test failure','',('- endpoint: ' + $uri),('- model_requested: gemini-flash-latest'),('- status_code: ' + $statusCode),('- exception_message: ' + $exceptionMessage),('- error_details: ' + $errorDetails),('- created_utc: ' + (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))) | Out-File -FilePath $summaryMdPath -Encoding utf8
  throw
}
